! eslint(no-useless-constructor): Redundant super call in constructor
    ,-[_fixtures/base/typescript.ts:64:3]
 63 | class Dog extends Animal {
 64 |   constructor(private alias: string) {
    :   ^^^^^|^^^^^
    :        `-- This constructor is unnecessary,
 65 |     super(alias);
    :     ^^^^^^|^^^^^
    :           `-- because it only passes arguments through to the superclass
 66 |   }
    `----
  help: Remove this constructor or add code to it.
  note: Subclasses automatically use the constructor of their superclass, making this redundant.

  x eslint(no-unassigned-vars): 'a' is always 'undefined' because it's never assigned.
    ,-[_fixtures/base/javascript.js:64:5]
 63 | 
 64 | let a, b, c,   d,   foo
    :     ^
 65 | 
    `----
  help: Variable declared without assignment. Either assign a value or remove the declaration.

  x eslint(no-unassigned-vars): 'b' is always 'undefined' because it's never assigned.
    ,-[_fixtures/base/javascript.js:64:8]
 63 | 
 64 | let a, b, c,   d,   foo
    :        ^
 65 | 
    `----
  help: Variable declared without assignment. Either assign a value or remove the declaration.

  x eslint(no-unassigned-vars): 'c' is always 'undefined' because it's never assigned.
    ,-[_fixtures/base/javascript.js:64:11]
 63 | 
 64 | let a, b, c,   d,   foo
    :           ^
 65 | 
    `----
  help: Variable declared without assignment. Either assign a value or remove the declaration.

  x eslint(no-unassigned-vars): 'd' is always 'undefined' because it's never assigned.
    ,-[_fixtures/base/javascript.js:64:16]
 63 | 
 64 | let a, b, c,   d,   foo
    :                ^
 65 | 
    `----
  help: Variable declared without assignment. Either assign a value or remove the declaration.

  x eslint(no-unassigned-vars): 'foo' is always 'undefined' because it's never assigned.

 63 | 
 64 | let a, b, c,   d,   foo
    :                     ^^^
 65 | 
    `----
  help: Variable declared without assignment. Either assign a value or remove the declaration.

Found 1 warning and 5 errors.
